summary: AI Campaign Engine feature testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new campaign builder features verified - Delivery Mode (Automated/Manual), AI-Powered Messages toggle, Campaign Level selector (for admins), channel selector (SMS/Email) per step.
critical_code_review_comments: AI clone prompt endpoints properly use global fallback when user-specific prompt is not set
AI message generation correctly uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations LlmChat
handle-reply endpoint returns delay_seconds (60-180) for human-like timing simulation
Campaign model properly includes new fields: delivery_mode, ai_enabled, ownership_level
CampaignSequenceStep includes channel, ai_generated, step_context fields
Frontend Campaign Level section is correctly gated to super_admin role
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing user and contact
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Campaign Engine iteration 56 testing complete. All endpoints at /api/ai-campaigns/* working: clone-prompt/global (GET/PUT), clone-prompt/user/{id} (GET/PUT/DELETE), generate-message (SMS/email), preview-clone, handle-reply. Pending-sends endpoints at /api/campaigns/{user_id}/pending-sends work correctly. Frontend campaign builder at /campaigns/new shows all new sections: Delivery Mode, AI-Powered Messages, Campaign Level (admin only), channel selector per step.

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: MOCKED - campaign messages logged but not sent via Twilio
